allow: Bash(node -e "const db = require\('./db'\); db.query\('SELECT 1'\).then\(\(\) => console.log\('DB OK'\)\).catch\(e => console.error\('DB ERROR:', e.message\)\)"2)
Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const db = require\('./db'\); db.query\('SELECT 1'\).then\(\(\) => console.log\('DB OK'\)\).catch\(e => console.error\('DB ERROR:', e.message\)\)")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const db = require\('./db'\); \(async \(\) => { try { const rows = await db.query\('SELECT 1 as test'\); console.log\('Backend DB OK:', rows\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('Backend DB error:', e.message\); } process.exit\(0\); }\)\(\)")
